## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and Pixis for AI-driven content marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) offers AI-powered content creation, programmatic SEO, and growth marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Jason aims to position Pixis as the AI resource hub for marketers, with a focus on varied content types and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Collaboration opportunities identified in content creation, programmatic SEO, and leveraging Jason's network for expert content series](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Initial focus will be on editorial and programmatic content, with potential for expanded services in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI-Powered Services

  - [Custom AI workflows for content generation, including research, outline creation, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO capabilities for high-volume, extensible content (e.g., glossaries, location-based content)](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Integration of AI tools for sales enablement (e.g., Gong call analysis, personalized email generation)](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Content strategy focused on building trust through initial content creation, then expanding to other services](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Pixis's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Website and content overhaul in progress, with new site launch expected by end of March](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Aim to become the AI resource hub for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Current growth primarily driven by high-level advisor connections and events](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [$5 million marketing budget allocated for growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Start with editorial and programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO opportunities specific to Pixis's use case](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Leverage Jason's network for expert content series (podcasts, roundtables)](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Potential for newsletter creation and distribution strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Technical SEO support for upcoming website migration](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Additional Growth Areas

  - [Stellar agency brand development (Pixis's agency acquisition arm)](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Cross-linking and backlinking opportunities with fwd.digital's other clients](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a proposal by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting early next week to finalize details](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Begin content creation efforts as soon as possible to build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO opportunities specific to Pixis's market](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Marcel to draft a testimonial quote from Jason for fwd.digital's new website](https://fathom.video/share/Whve6stADgrDeEQgnTPt7A56idwBUa5m?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
